Prerequisite: CPPL200.

Restriction: Students must be enrolled in the College Park Scholars Public Leadership (CPPL) program.

CPSA - College Park Scholars-Arts

CPSA100 College Park Scholars: Arts First-Year Colloquium | (1 Credit) Introductory colloquium: Aesthetic, intellectual and personal examination of the arts.

Restriction: Students must be matriculated into the College Park Scholars Arts (CPSA) program.
